appConfiguration.label: Test Mode
appConfiguration.description: Use when testing the machine. When live, turn off!

appConfiguration.label: App Timeout Seconds
appConfiguration.description: The app will return to landing if selection or payment pages are idle for this number of seconds

appConfiguration.label: Vend On Card Errors
appConfiguration.description: Rather than vending only when there is a successful card auth; instead vend in any scenario.
